scenarios.precondition: Element el = new Element("div"); // no children

scenarios.description: childNodes contain only TextNode => children returns empty (filter none)
scenarios.precondition: Element el = new Element("p"); el.appendChild(new TextNode("text"));

scenarios.description: single child Element returns list of size 1 (loop-1-match)
scenarios.precondition: Element parent = new Element("div"); parent.appendChild(new Element("span"));

scenarios.description: multiple child Elements returns all in order (loop-N-match)
scenarios.precondition: Element el = new Element("ul"); el.appendChild(new Element("li")); el.appendChild(new Element("li")); el.appendChild(new Element("li"));
scenarios.expectedResult: returned Elements.size() == 3 and tags are ["li","li","li"] in order

scenarios.description: mixed child nodes filters non-Element and Element correctly (loop-N-filter)
scenarios.precondition: Element el = new Element("div"); el.appendChild(new TextNode("t")); el.appendChild(new Element("a")); el.appendChild(new Comment("c")); el.appendChild(new Element("b"));
scenarios.expectedResult: returned Elements.size() == 2 and tags are ["a","b"] in order
pseudocode: assert result.size() == 2; assert result.get(0).tagName().equals("a"); assert result.get(1).tagName().equals("b");

scenarios.description: caching path: cachedChildren returns pre-cached list (cache-hit)
scenarios.precondition:
// simulate attributes.userData cache hit
Element el = new Element("div"); el.appendChild(new Element("span")); Map<String,Object> ud = el.attributes().userData(); List<Element> cached = Collections.unmodifiableList(Arrays.asList(el.child(0))); ud.put("jsoup.childEls", new java.lang.ref.WeakReference<>(cached)); ud.put("jsoup.childElsMod", el.childNodes.modCount());

scenarios.description: cache-miss due to missing userData reference results in fresh list
scenarios.precondition: Element el = new Element("div"); el.appendChild(new Element("p")); Map<String,Object> ud = el.attributes().userData(); ud.put("jsoup.childEls", new WeakReference<List<Element>>(null)); ud.put("jsoup.childElsMod", el.childNodes.modCount());
scenarios.expectedResult: returned Elements.size() == 1 and not using cached reference

scenarios.description: cache-miss due to modCount mismatch refreshes list
scenarios.precondition: Element el = new Element("div"); el.appendChild(new Element("span")); Map<String,Object> ud = el.attributes().userData(); List<Element> cached = Collections.unmodifiableList(Arrays.asList(el.child(0))); ud.put("jsoup.childEls", new WeakReference<>(cached)); ud.put("jsoup.childElsMod", el.childNodes.modCount()+1);
scenarios.expectedResult: returned Elements.size() == 1 and new list instance

scenarios.description: large number of children N=10 performance path (loop-N-large)
scenarios.precondition: Element el = new Element("div"); for i in 1..10 el.appendChild(new Element("i"+i));
scenarios.expectedResult: returned Elements.size() == 10 and all tags correct

scenarios.description: concurrent modification invalidates cache and refreshes (loop-2)
scenarios.expectedResult: returned Elements.size() == 2 and fresh list contains both
